Built for organizations that need full control.

pricing.estimator.label: Daily usage
pricing.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
pricing.faq.a1: Tokens are the currency used by SIMY's AI engine. Each code generation task, review, and pull request consumes tokens based on complexity. Your plan includes a monthly token allocation that resets each billing cycle.
pricing.faq.a2: Yes. Upgrade or downgrade at any time. When upgrading, you'll receive the additional tokens immediately. When downgrading, the change takes effect at the start of your next billing cycle.
pricing.faq.q3: What happens if I run out of tokens?
pricing.faq.a3: If you exhaust your monthly allocation, you can purchase additional token packs or upgrade your plan. Your existing work and data remain fully accessible.
pricing.faq.a4: Monthly token allocations reset each billing cycle and do not roll over. For maximum flexibility, consider the Scale plan or contact us about Enterprise options.
pricing.faq.a5: Yes. Choose annual billing to save 17% compared to monthly pricing. Annual plans are billed upfront for the full year.
